tasks.subject: Task 1: Notification schema + migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a Notification model (recipient, document, type, actor, read) with inverse relations and a migration.

**Verify:** pnpm prisma migrate dev --name notifications; pnpm test:unit; pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Notification model + indexes", "User/Document inverse relations", "migration applies; tests+build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: API token service (lib/tokens.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate (plaintext-once), verify (hash-lookup + lastUsedAt bump), list, revoke API tokens.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/tokens.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/tokens.ts", "tests/unit/tokens.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/tokens.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generate plaintext-once + hash stored", "verify roundtrip + null cases", "listTokens hides hash", "revoke invalidates"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Feedback consolidation (lib/feedback.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure consolidateFeedback(detail) → markdown digest + JSON + decision; getPlanFeedback(id) wrapper.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/feedback.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/feedback.ts", "tests/unit/feedback.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/feedback.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["decision mapping", "markdown digest + empty case", "structured arrays", "getPlanFeedback null on unknown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: createDocument options + requireApiUser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createDocument source/agentContext option + Bearer helper requireApiUser.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/documents.test.ts && pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/documents.ts", "lib/api.ts", "tests/unit/documents.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/documents.test.ts && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createDocument opts persist source+agentContext", "defaults WEB/null", "requireApiUser bearer", "tests+build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Notifications service + wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Participant fan-out + read helpers, wired best-effort into addComment/setThreadStatus(+userId)/submitReview/createVersion.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/notifications.ts", "tests/unit/notifications.test.ts", "lib/annotations.ts", "lib/reviews.ts", "lib/versions.ts", "app/api/annotations/[id]/route.ts", "tests/unit/annotations.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["participant fan-out excludes actor", "list/markRead/markAllRead/unreadCount", "best-effort wiring in 4 services", "all unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Machine API routes (/api/plans)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bearer plan endpoints: POST create, PATCH revise, GET feedback.

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/plans/route.ts", "app/api/plans/[id]/route.ts", "app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST creates+reviewUrl", "PATCH version+409", "GET feedback+404", "all Bearer-guarded 401"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Token API + Settings UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Session-authed token CRUD + Settings→tokens page (create/revoke + setup snippet).

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/tokens/route.ts", "app/api/tokens/[id]/route.ts", "app/app/settings/tokens/page.tsx", "components/TokenManager.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["token CRUD session-guarded", "create shows plaintext once", "list hides hash", "setup snippet rendered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Notifications API + inbox + header badge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** notifications list/mark API, inbox page, header unread badge.

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/notifications/route.ts", "app/app/inbox/page.tsx", "components/InboxList.tsx", "app/app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET/PATCH session-guarded", "inbox rows deep-link + mark read", "header unread badge", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: CLI commands (/push-plan, /pull-feedback)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship push-plan + pull-feedback Claude Code commands in-repo.

**Verify:** command git status --porcelain .claude/commands

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/commands/push-plan.md", ".claude/commands/pull-feedback.md"], "verifyCommand": "command git status --porcelain .claude/commands", "acceptanceCriteria": ["push-plan posts + prints reviewUrl/id", "pull-feedback GETs + injects digest", "valid frontmatter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Packaging — conditional standalone + compose
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Env-gate output: standalone (fix next start mismatch) + add docker-compose.yml.

**Verify:** pnpm build && pnpm test:e2e

```json:metadata
{"files": ["next.config.ts", "Dockerfile", "docker-compose.yml"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && pnpm test:e2e", "acceptanceCriteria": ["standalone gated on BUILD_STANDALONE", "Dockerfile sets flag", "compose file valid", "build no-warning + e2e pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: E2E — machine API token flow + notifications
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove token→push plan→feedback + participant notifications end-to-end.

**Verify:** pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/integration.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/integration.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/integration.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["token→POST plan→feedback pending", "unauth 401", "comment notifies owner inbox", "e2e passes"]}
```
